name: Talmundo
tagline: AI-enhanced onboarding platform for engaging new hire journeys
description: Talmundo is a digital onboarding platform that uses AI to create interactive and engaging onboarding journeys. Its platform features gamified content, personalized learning paths, chatbot assistance, and automated task management. Talmundo helps organizations reduce time-to-productivity for new hires while ensuring consistent delivery of company culture and knowledge.
